2200.full_name: Makhrama bin Nawfal bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab bin Murrah b. Ka'b

2201.full_name: al-Miswar bin Makhrama bin Nawfal bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab bin Murrah b. Ka'b

2202.full_name: al-Salat bin Makhrama bin Nawfal bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab bin Murrah b. Ka'b

2203.full_name: Safwan bin Makhrama bin Nawfal bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab bin Murrah b. Ka'b

2204.full_name: 'Amir bin Makhrama bin Nawfal bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab bin Murrah b. Ka'b
2204.arabic: عامر بن مخرمة بن نوفل القرشي الزهري

2205.short_name: Umayma bint Ruqayqa bint Abi Sayfi
2205.full_name: Umayma bint Ruqayqa bint (Abi) Sayfi bin Hashim 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra b. Ka'b
2205.arabic: أميمة بنت رقيقة بنت أبي صيفي

2206.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin al-Aswad b. 'Abd Yaghuth b. Wahb b. 'Abd Manaf b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
2206.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن الأسود بن عبد يغوث القرشي
2206.spouses: Ama bint 'Abdullah bin Wahb of B.Zuhrah,Umm Walad

2207.full_name: Khalida bint al-Aswad b. 'Abd Yaghuth b. Wahb b. 'Abd Manaf b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
2207.arabic: خالدة بنت الأسود بن عبد يغوث القرشي
2207.bio: His father died as disbeliever. Prophet mention Quranic Ayah (10:31) when he saw her in one of his wife's. house

2208.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Arqam b. 'Abd Yaghuth b. Wahb b. 'Abd Manaf b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
2208.bio: His father died as disbeliever. He was Wali of Baitul maal during 'Umar and 'Uthman Khilifat.

2209.full_name: 'Abdullah(Asghar) bin Shihab b. 'Abdullah b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
2209.arabic: عبد الله الأصغر بن شهاب بن عبد الله
2209.bio: The Famous Scholar al-Zuhri is a descendant of him. According to some sources he migrated to Abyssinia and then died in Makkah before the migration of Medina. According to others, he participated Badr and Uhud with pagans of Quraish.

2210.full_name: Masruh bin Thuwaybah, the Client of Abu Lahab
2210.bio: His mother, Thuwayba,  was the servant of Abd-al-Uzza ibn 'Abdul Muttalib, better known as Abu Lahab. Thuwaybah became Prophet Muhammad's (ﷺ) first nurse. Later, Thuwaybah became a Muslim. Her son died before her, and she herself died in 7 AH.

2211.full_name: 'Abdullah(Akbar) bin Shihab b. 'Abdullah b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
2211.arabic: عبد الله الأكبر بن شهاب بن عبد الله
2211.bio: The Famous Scholar al-Zuhri is a descendant of him. According to some sources, he died before the migration of Abyssinia.

2215.full_name: Azhar bin 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah

2216.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Azhar bin 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
2216.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن أزهر بن عبد عوف الزهري

2230.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Khabbab b. al-Aratt b. Jandalah b. Sa`d b. Khuzayma .. b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
2230.arabic: عبد الله بن خباب بن الأرت
2230.students: 912,قيل عبد الله بن عبد الله بن الحارث,4046,10787,10770

2231.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Khabbab b. al-Aratt b. Jandalah b. Sa`d .. b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
2231.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن خباب بن الأرت

2232.full_name: Zaynab bint Khabbab b. al-Aratt b. Jandalah b. Sa`d .. b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim

2233.full_name: Mulayka wife of Khabbab bin al-Aratt b. Jandalah b. Sa`d .. b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim

2240.full_name: 'Utba  ibn Abi Waqqas (Malik) bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b
2240.mother_name: Hamnah bint Sufyan bin Umayyah bin 'Abd Shams
2240.bio: He died during the life of Prophet(ﷺ). There is disagreement whether he died as a Muslim or as a disbeliever.

2241.full_name: Nafi' bin 'Utba  ibn Abi Waqqas (Malik) bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab b. Murrah
2241.arabic: نافع بن عتبة بن أبي وقاص

2242.full_name: Hashim bin 'Utba  ibn Abi Waqqas (Malik) bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab b. Murrah
2242.arabic: هاشم بن عتبة بن أبي وقاص

2280.full_name: Jabla bin Harithah ibn Sharahil (b. Ka'b) b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Zayd b. Imru'ul-Qays al-Kalbi
2280.mother_name: Su`da bint Tha`laba of B. Ma'n
2280.bio: Full Lineage: Jabla bin Harithah ibn Sharahil (b. Ka'b) b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Zayd b. Imru'ul-Qays b. 'Amir b. al-Nu'man (b. 'Amir b. 'Abdood b. 'Auf b. Kinana b. Bakr b. 'Auf b. 'Udhra) b. Zayd al-Lat b. Rafayda b. Thur b. Kalb b. Wabra b. Taghlab b. Halwan b. 'Aimran b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a

2281.full_name: Harithah ibn Sharahil (b. Ka'b) b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Zayd b. Imru'ul-Qays al-Kalbi
2281.bio: Full Lineage: Harithah ibn Sharahil (b. Ka'b) b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Zayd b. Imru'ul-Qays b. 'Amir b. al-Nu'man (b. 'Amir b. 'Abdood b. 'Auf b. Kinana b. Bakr b. 'Auf b. 'Udhra) b. Zayd al-Lat b. Rafayda b. Thur b. Kalb b. Wabra b. Taghlab b. Halwan b. 'Aimran b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
2281.spouses: Su`da bint Tha`laba of B. Ma'n
